name: @MICTCWM/react-18-to-19-migration
description: One-click migration workflow from React 18 to React 19

scripts.migrate:default-props: npx codemod@latest jssg run scripts/codemods/replace-default-props.ts --language tsx -t ./src --no-interactive --allow-dirty
scripts.migrate:forward-ref: npx codemod@latest jssg run scripts/codemods/remove-forward-ref.ts --language tsx -t ./src --no-interactive --allow-dirty
scripts.migrate:context-type: npx codemod@latest jssg run scripts/codemods/replace-context-type.ts --language tsx -t ./src --no-interactive --allow-dirty

author: MICTCWM <>
